headline: Allegion to Attend 2026 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference
summary: DUBLIN, June 02, 2026--Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE) President and CEO John H. Stone will discuss the company’s long-term strategy at the 2026 Wells Fargo Industrials & Materials Conference on Tuesday, June 9. The conference will be held at Loews Chicago Hotel.
